'''ProTech''' was a company that specialized in the production of [[Pulse-wave rifle|pulse-wave weapons]] and personal defense devices including advanced sets of [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. They were a prominent business during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

{{Company-stub}}
